Interface ILasTile

ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions

ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasOrganizer.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3E5F6E2C-BD7A-4C2D-B734-788F549DADB3")]
public interface ILasTile : ILasOrganize
